sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἦν

- Transliteration: En

- Phonetic: ane

- Definition:

1. I was, etc.

- Origin: imperfect of G1510

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Imperfect of G1510; I (thou etc.) was (wast or were): - + agree be X have (+ charge of) hold use was (-t) were.
